landing.heroSubtitle: Upload a photo and receive an instant, AI-powered skin health assessment. Get a detailed verdict and connect with verified dermatologists — all in one place.
landing.featuresSubtitle: From AI diagnostics to specialist consultations — one seamless experience.
landing.featureAiDesc: Upload a photo of your skin concern and receive an instant, detailed assessment powered by advanced AI. Our dual-model approach uses fast screening followed by deep analysis for maximum accuracy.
landing.featureDoctorDesc: Connect directly with verified dermatologists through built-in chat. Get professional opinions, ask follow-up questions, and receive personalized guidance.
landing.featureHistoryDesc: Every evaluation is saved with photos, answers, and AI verdicts. Track changes over time and share your history with doctors for better-informed care.
landing.featureCommunityDesc: A dedicated forum where medical professionals discuss cases, share insights, and collaborate. Doctors can consult with colleagues for second opinions on complex cases.
landing.stepsSubtitle: From photo to professional guidance in four steps.
landing.step1Desc: Take or upload a clear photo of your skin concern.
landing.step2Desc: Our AI examines the image using dual-model diagnostics.
landing.step3Desc: Receive a comprehensive assessment with recommendations.
landing.step4Desc: Connect with a specialist for professional follow-up.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of users who trust AI-powered analysis for early detection and peace of mind.
landing.footer: © {year} Skin Health. For informational purposes only — not a substitute for professional medical advice.

auth.pendingDesc: Your doctor account has been successfully created and is currently under review.
auth.pendingInfo: An administrator will verify your credentials shortly. You will be able to access the Doctor Portal once approved.

patient.uploadHint: For best results, ensure the area is well-lit and in focus.
patient.analyzingDetail: Applying deep learning models to identify visual characteristics.
patient.analysisDetail: We've gathered visual data. Please answer 5 standard questions to formulate a final verdict.
patient.q1: 1. How long have you had this condition?
patient.q2: 2. Does it itch, burn, or cause pain?
patient.q2Placeholder: e.g. Mild itching in the evening
patient.q3: 3. Have you used any treatments or creams on it?
patient.q4: 4. Has it changed in size, shape, or color recently?
patient.q4Placeholder: e.g. Growing larger last few days
patient.q5: 5. Do you have a family history of skin cancer or similar conditions?
patient.disclaimerText: This review is provided by an AI model and is for informational purposes only. It is not an alternative to professional medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. Always consult with a qualified healthcare provider.
patient.historyEmpty: You haven't completed any AI skin checks yet.
patient.doctorsSubtitle: Select a doctor to start a consultation.
patient.doctorsEmpty: No doctors are currently registered in the system.
patient.chatsEmpty: You don't have any active consultations yet.
patient.chatEmpty: No messages yet. Send a message to start the consultation.
patient.phoneReadonly: Phone number cannot be changed. Contact admin for assistance.

doctor.patientsSubtitle: Patients who have consulted with you.
doctor.patientsEmpty: You don't have any patients in your base yet. Patients will appear here once they start a chat with you.
doctor.consultationsEmpty: You don't have active consultations yet. Patients will appear here when they contact you.
doctor.chatEmpty: No messages yet. Send a message to start the consultation.
doctor.forumSubtitle: Discuss clinical cases, share experiences, and collaborate with verified doctors.
doctor.forumEmptyHint: Starting a discussion to share knowledge with your peers.
doctor.noReplies: No replies yet. Be the first to start the discussion!
doctor.colleaguesSubtitle: Connect with other doctors for consultations and discussions.
doctor.colleaguesEmpty: No other doctors are currently available.
doctor.doctorChatsEmpty: No colleague conversations yet. Visit the Colleagues page to start a chat with another doctor.
doctor.doctorChatEmpty: No messages yet. Send a message to start the conversation.
doctor.patientHistoryEmpty: This patient hasn't completed any AI skin checks yet.

admin.registerSubtitle: Create an account for a new medical professional. They will log in using their phone number.
admin.overviewDesc: Metrics and quick stats will appear here.
admin.doctorsSubtitle: Review pending approvals and manage registered doctors.
admin.patientsSubtitle: Review registered patients and moderate accounts.
